data.title: Rare Signal That Preceded 630% XRP Gain Has Just Flashed Again, According to Crypto Trader
data.description:
A closely followed crypto analyst says that a rare bullish signal is suddenly flashing again for one top-10 altcoin.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/17/rare-signal-that-preceded-630-xrp-gain-has-just-flashed-again-according-to-crypto-trader/

data.title: Russia’s Sberbank Seeks Green Light for Crypto Custody Amid Regulatory Push
data.description:
Russia’s Sberbank has submitted proposals to let customers store crypto under bank custody, letting tokens be frozen on law-enforcement request while reducing hack risks. The move reflects Moscow’s shift toward regulated digital assets amid sanctions and a scheduled 2026 digital ruble launch.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/russias-sberbank-2026-crypto-custody-launch/

data.title: Myriad Moves: Will XRP and Ethereum Hit All-Time Highs? And Wen PUMP Airdrop?
data.description:
Top markets on Myriad this week center on record price marks for Ethereum and XRP, along with the Pump. fun (PUMP) token airdrop.
source: https://decrypt.co/330669/myriad-moves-will-xrp-ethereum-hit-all-time-highs-wen-pump-airdrop

data.title: Canary Capital Files for First-Ever Injective (INJ) Staking ETF
data.description:
TL;DR Canary Capital is looking to launch the first staked Injective ETF in the U. S. , combining direct exposure to the token with staking rewards. The SEC is considering exempting staking from registration requirements, though it hasn’t yet reached a definitive position. Canary has already submitted similar proposals for other blockchains and is moving forward with. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/canary-capital-files-for-first-ever-injective-inj-staking-etf/

data.title: Uber partners with Lucid and Nuro in a $300 million deal to deploy over 20,000 robotaxis
data.description:
Uber announced today that it would collaborate with Lucid and Nuro to deploy over 20,000 robotaxis over the next six years, beginning in 2026.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uber-partners-with-lucid-and-nuro/

data.title: Crypto Messaging App Ephemera Bags $20M Series B at $300M Valuation
data.description:
Union Square Ventures, A16z Crypto and Lightspeed Faction co-led the round with participation from Coinbase, Sound Ventures, and the actor Ashton Kutcher.
source: https://www.nftgators.com/crypto-messaging-app-ephemera-bags-20m-series-b-at-300m-valuation/

data.title: Pakistan and El Salvador Strengthen Diplomatic Ties With New Crypto Alliance
data.description:
Pakistan and El Salvador have formed diplomatic ties with cryptocurrency cooperation at the core. Islamabad has planned a national Bitcoin reserve, a 2 GW mining allocation and a dedicated regulator, while San Salvador has continued state Bitcoin purchases under its IMF programme.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/pakistan-el-salvador-crypto-alliance/

data.title: Democratic Support for CLARITY and GENIUS Acts Expected in House Vote
data.description: According to BlockBeats, crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett reported that a Democratic member of the House of Representatives, involved in rallying support for cryptocurrency legislation, indicated that approximately 35 Democrats are expected to back the CLARITY Act if all goes as planned. The vote is anticipated to take place around 4 p.m. today. Additionally, the GENIUS Act is projected to receive support from 70 to 80 Democratic members.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 119,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.30% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 17, 2025, 17:49 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 119,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 119,043.976563 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.30% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Wormhole almost killed Solana DeFi — now works with Blackrock, Hamilton Lane
data.description:
Wormhole, the blockchain bridge that suffered a series of losses in 2022, is earning partnerships with the world’s biggest asset managers.
source: https://protos.com/wormhole-almost-killed-solana-defi-now-works-with-blackrock-hamilton-lane/

data.title: Ripple co-founder Chris Larsen’s cash out $26 million worth of XRP to Coinbase
data.description:
Chris Larsen, co-founder and executive chairman of Ripple Labs, reportedly transferred $26 million worth of XRP to Coinbase this week, according to on-chain data from XRPScan. The records revealed several outgoing transactions from Larsen’s wallet to Coinbase, totaling over 8 million XRP on July 15. Larsen’s wallet activity comes against the backdrop of an XRP […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripples-larsens-cashes-out-26m-worth-of-xrp/

data.title: Bit Origin secures $500 million equity to launch Dogecoin treasury
data.description:
Bit Origin Ltd has announced plans to establish a Dogecoin treasury, backed by a $500 million equity and debt deal with accredited investors. The company, formerly known as China Xiangtai Food Co. , Ltd, could become the first publicly traded holder of Dogecoin. According to a press statement released on Thursday, finance for the Dogecoin treasury […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bit-origin-secures-500m-dogecoin-treasury/

data.title: AI Companies Want to Read Your Chatbot's Thoughts—And That Might Include Yours
data.description:
A new paper from 40+ AI safety researchers proposes monitoring the "thoughts" of AI models before they act. Experts warn this safety tool could become a surveillance weapon.
source: https://decrypt.co/330647/ai-companies-want-read-your-chatbots-thoughts-might-include-yours

data.title: Ethereum surpasses a $410 billion market cap as bulls get increasingly excited
data.description:
Ethereum ripped past a $410 billion market cap on Wednesday after jumping 5% to $3,400, its highest level since February, according to figures pulled from CoinGecko. The surge came as a wave of capital flowed into spot exchange-traded funds tied to the crypto. Nine ETH ETFs saw their largest-ever daily net inflow, totaling $726. 74 million, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-surpasses-a-410-billion-market-cap/

data.title: Kevin Warsh calls for Fed-Treasury alliance while angling to replace Powell
data.description:
Kevin Warsh wants Powell gone. The former Fed governor, now one of Trump’s top picks to lead the central bank, didn’t dance around it during a Thursday interview on CNBC. He said the Federal Reserve needs a full-on “regime change” and slammed the people still running it, especially Jerome Powell, for what he sees as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kevin-warsh-calls-for-fed-treasury-alliance/

data.title: OpenAI Introduces ChatGPT Agent
data.description: According to BlockBeats, OpenAI has announced the launch of its new ChatGPT agent. This development marks a significant step in the evolution of AI technology, offering enhanced capabilities for users seeking advanced conversational interactions. The ChatGPT agent is designed to improve user experience by providing more accurate and context-aware responses, further solidifying OpenAI's position in the AI industry.

data.title: White House Prepares for GENIUS Act Signing Ceremony
data.description: According to BlockBeats, crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett reported that the White House is preparing for the passage of the GENIUS Act today. The signing ceremony is scheduled for tomorrow at 2:30 PM Eastern Time, with industry leaders and legislators expected to attend.
